title: Long-sentence drill
description: Complex sentences with subclauses — sustain speed through length
text: Although the meeting was scheduled for ten in the morning, several team members, including the director and the project lead, did not arrive until almost half past, which delayed the agenda by nearly forty-five minutes.
tips: Subclauses (', which ...') need extra rhythm awareness
Don't rush the comma — but don't pause either

character_tips.anna: Long sentences test sustained focus. Don't lose steam halfway through.
character_tips.maxim: Legal and academic writing lives here. Master this length.
character_tips.klavochka: Like a long melody, my dear — sustained and steady 🎶
